objective: Open the governance rollout tracker for governed research specialist consumer adoption, bind the first pilot lane to Stampede issue #208, and keep this branch planning-only while consumer repo mutations stay separate.
scope_boundary: Issue-backed planning packet, governance mirror updates, and verifier-baseline proof for the first consumer rollout lane.
Opening the first consumer pilot issue in Stampede (#208).
No direct consumer-repo mutation in this branch.
out_of_scope: Direct edits to Stampede or any other consumer repo in this branch.
Central GitHub settings mutation in consumer repos.
Broad multi-repo consumer rollout in this first packet.
Reopening governance-source research specialist design from issue #589.
research_summary: Issue #589 completed the governance-source research specialist contract, but a live verifier replay against Stampede still fails on stale package/version and missing managed surfaces. Specialist QA recommended the narrowest compliant next step: keep issue #591 planning-only, open one consumer pilot issue, and use the consumer verifier replay as the hard proof boundary before any repo-native adoption work begins.

sprints.name: Planning packet and first consumer issue
sprints.goal: Capture the bounded consumer rollout scope and open the first repo-native pilot issue without mutating the consumer repo.
tasks: Write the issue-591 PDCAR, structured plan, planning execution scope, and planning handoff.
Open Stampede issue #208 as the first consumer pilot lane with repo-specific acceptance criteria.
Update governance mirrors to reflect issue #591 and the Stampede pilot.
Replay the governed consumer verifier against Stampede and record the expected stale-baseline result.
Run the governed Claude review path against the packet before closeout.
acceptance_criteria: The issue-591 packet validates locally as planning_only.
Stampede issue #208 exists with repo-specific acceptance criteria for managed research-specialist surface adoption.
The verifier replay against Stampede is recorded as stale-baseline proof without mutating Stampede.
Alternate-family review is recorded through the governed wrapper path before planning closeout.

specialist_reviews.focus: Confirm the narrowest compliant first-consumer rollout proof boundary for issue #591.
specialist_reviews.summary: The first issue-591 packet should stay planning-only, open one consumer pilot issue, and prove the current baseline with a verifier replay. Central GitHub settings remain report-only and should not be part of this first rollout slice.

alternate_model_review.reviewer: Claude specialist review via scripts/codex-review.sh claude
alternate_model_review.summary: Governed alternate-family review accepted the planning packet with follow-up only: confirm Stampede issue #208 is open, record the listed validation commands, update the cross-review artifact, and remove the duplicate review_artifact_refs key from the handoff JSON.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Create the issue-591 planning packet, open the first consumer pilot issue in Stampede, update governance mirrors, and record stale-baseline verifier proof without mutating any consumer repo.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Incorporate the accepted_with_followup Claude review notes, record the validator and verifier results, and finalize planning-only closeout for the issue-591 packet.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: Issue #591 remains planning-only and governance-only in this branch.
Stampede issue #208 exists with the expected repo-specific consumer rollout acceptance criteria.
The verifier replay proves the current Stampede baseline is stale against the governance contract.
Governance mirrors reflect the open rollout epic and the first pilot lane.

material_deviation_rules: Do not widen issue #591 into direct consumer-repo mutation work.
Do not treat a stale verifier failure as proof of consumer adoption.
Do not include central GitHub settings mutation in this first rollout packet.
